overall.description: Dashcam footage capturing a nighttime drive on a rain-soaked highway. Windshield wipers work continuously to clear heavy rainfall while the vehicle navigates winding roads illuminated by headlights, encountering occasional traffic and emergency vehicles.

events.description: yellow curve warning sign becomes visible on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the highway during heavy rain with windshield wipers active at high speed

entered.detail: metal guardrail running along the right side of the highway
rain-soaked asphalt highway surface reflecting headlights
car dashboard with illuminated speedometer and infotainment screen
yellow diamond-shaped warning sign indicating a curve in the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a rain-soaked highway at night, with windshield wipers clearing the heavy downpour. A yellow curve warning sign appears on the left as the road bends, while guardrails line the right side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway curve with emergency vehicle on shoulder

events.description: blue emergency vehicle lights flash brightly on the left shoulder of the highway

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed while passing other vehicles and approaching an emergency vehicle on the roadside

notable_agents.action: emergency vehicle with flashing blue lights parked on the left shoulder

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through the rainy night, navigating a curve where the guardrail shifts to the left side. Flashing blue emergency lights from a parked vehicle illuminate the left shoulder around the 23-second mark.

events.description: vehicle ahead applies brakes, illuminating red tail lights in the rain

agents.ego_description: following slower traffic ahead while maintaining safe distance on the wet highway

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead with brake lights illuminated, slowing traffic flow

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches slower traffic on the rain-soaked highway, with multiple vehicles visible ahead displaying red brake lights. The guardrail curves back to the right side as the driver maintains a safe following distance through the continuing downpour.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous nighttime drive along a rain-soaked highway that transitions from an open, winding road into a congested stretch of traffic. It begins with the vehicle navigating a bend under a heavy downpour, where windshield wipers clear the glass as a yellow curve warning sign passes on the left. As the road continues to curve, the guardrail shifts to the left side and the darkness is momentarily broken by the flashing blue lights of an emergency vehicle parked on the shoulder. The scene then shifts as the vehicle approaches a cluster of slower traffic, with the headlights reflecting off the wet pavement and red brake lights appearing ahead. Finally, the guardrail curves back to the right side while the driver maintains a steady distance behind the other cars amidst the persistent rain.
